name: Tradogram Procurement Management API
what_it_does: Tradogram REST API for cloud-based procurement and purchase order management platform targeting SMB and mid-market organizations. Enables AI agents to manage purchase order creation and approval workflow automation, handle supplier management and vendor database retrieval, access spend analytics and budget tracking data for procurement analytics, retrieve requisition and approval workflow status for procurement operations, manage contract and supplier agreement tracking, handle receiving and invoice matching workflow automation, access item catalog and approved product list management, retrieve supplier performance and evaluation data, manage department budget and spend allocation data, and integrate procurement data with accounting, ERP, and financial management systems.
use_cases: Automating purchase order creation from procurement agents
Tracking approval workflows from spend management agents
Retrieving supplier data from vendor management agents
Monitoring budget utilization from finance analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise sourcing without SMB and mid-market procurement focus
Complex strategic sourcing without straightforward P2P automation
Manufacturing procurement without general business spending management
best_when: A small-to-mid business using Tradogram wants AI agents to automate purchase order creation, approval workflows, supplier management, spend tracking, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated purchase order creation commits financial obligations — implement approval workflows for automated PO creation beyond defined thresholds. Automated supplier selection without procurement policy validation bypasses vendor qualification controls. Spend data automation errors affect budget and financial reporting accuracy.

auth.notes: Tradogram uses API key and OAuth 2.0. Per-organization credentials. Integration documentation at tradogram.com/integrations. Webhooks for procurement events. REST API with JSON. Ottawa, Ontario HQ. Small-to-mid market procurement platform. QuickBooks and Xero native integration. Zapier integration available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan with limited users and POs; paid plans for advanced features and API access
pricing.notes: Ottawa, Ontario. Founded 2013. Private. SMB procurement market. Strong in small-to-mid organizations without enterprise procurement budgets. Free plan attracts SMB market. QuickBooks and Xero integration popular with SMB. Competes with Procurify and Coupa (enterprise) for procurement automation market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in integration portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated PO creation commits financial obligations; implement dollar threshold approval workflows before automated PO submission
Approval workflow bypass risk — automated PO creation can bypass configured approval workflows if submitted with wrong parameters; validate approval chain triggers before automation
SMB API maturity — Tradogram API is less mature than enterprise procurement platforms; expect more frequent changes and limited documentation depth
QuickBooks sync — Tradogram has native QuickBooks sync; avoid parallel accounting automation that conflicts with native integration to prevent duplicate entries
Free tier API limitations — API access may be restricted on free/starter tiers; verify plan API access before building production integrations
Supplier qualification — automated supplier selection should validate against approved supplier list; procurement policy requires supplier qualification before order placement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Procurement and spend management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/CA. Purchase order and supplier data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement management. SOC2. API key. US/CA. Purchase order and supplier data.
